message:
feat(fcp-host,manifest,sdk,testkit): discovery, manifest validation, and test expansion

fcp-host/discovery.rs (+72 lines):
  Extend peer discovery with connector-specific probing: when a known
  connector ID is discovered, run its self-check protocol and integrate
  the health result into the discovery cache.

fcp-host/tests:
  - agent_integration.rs: expand agent lifecycle integration test
    coverage with new assertions.
  - host_connector_integration.rs: update connector integration tests
    for revised discovery flow.
  - rate_limit_integration.rs: add rate limit boundary assertions.

fcp-manifest/lib.rs (+35 lines):
  Add manifest validation helpers for schema version compatibility
  checks and capability declaration verification.

fcp-manifest/tests/manifest_golden_vectors.rs (new):
  Golden vector tests ensuring manifest serialization stability across
  format changes.

fcp-sdk/runtime.rs:
  Minor runtime lifecycle adjustment for health check integration.

fcp-testkit/supervisor_examples.rs:
  Update supervisor example to match expanded connector types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
